tracks.meaning: a set of data or settings associated with a user account on a website, application, or online service
a summary description of a person's character, abilities, or psychological characteristics
to create an outline or summary of something before proceeding with full development or analysis
a description of a person's professional background, qualifications, and work history
a detailed description or record of a person's criminal history or past offenses
a publicly visible or known aspect of something presented to the world
the outline or silhouette of a person's face or head viewed from the side
the outline or contour of a landscape, skyline, or geological formation
the degree to which a software or system component is visible and used compared to others
to keep watch over someone or something while remaining inconspicuous or undercover
a cross-sectional representation showing the internal structure or composition of something
